Our Story

Built by developers, for developers.

Velocity was born from the frustration of setting up the same tooling over and over. We decided to create the starter we always wished existed.

Our Mission

To help developers ship beautiful, performant websites faster by eliminating boilerplate and providing sensible defaults.

What We Believe

Performance First

Every decision is made with performance in mind. Zero JavaScript by default, optimized images, and minimal CSS.

Simplicity Matters

We strip away complexity so you can focus on what matters: building great products for your users.

Open Source

Velocity is free and open source. We believe in giving back to the community that made this possible.
